## Profile Summary
items.value: Profile Summary

items.md: Dynamic Pre-Sales Consultant with 18+ years of experience in solution design, bid management, and technical consultation, specializing in electronic security, ELV systems, and integrated technology solutions. Proven ability to collaborate with sales and technical teams to create winning proposals, manage complex bids, and deliver customized solutions aligned with client needs and industry standards. Skilled in product design, estimation, competitive analysis, and developing pre-sales strategies to drive customer satisfaction and revenue growth. Adept at building client relationships, coordinating with vendors and OEMs, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards. Expert in preparing presentations, RFP responses, and technical proposals to secure high-value contracts across both public and private sectors.

Skilled in product design, estimation, competitive analysis, and developing pre-sales strategies to drive customer satisfaction and revenue growth. Adept at building client relationships, coordinating with vendors and OEMs, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards. Expert in preparing presentations, RFP responses, and technical proposals to secure high-value contracts across both public and private sectors.

# SUNIL SAHU

Mobile No: +91-9930009524

G/1106, Asha Jyoti, Samarth Garden, Datta Mandir Road, Bhandup (West) Mumbai – 400078.

E-mail: <u>sunilsahupm@gmail.com</u>

## Profile Summary

Dynamic Pre-Sales Consultant with 18+ years of experience in solution design, bid management, and technical consultation, specializing in electronic security, ELV systems, and integrated technology solutions. Proven ability to collaborate with sales and technical teams to create winning proposals, manage complex bids, and deliver customized solutions aligned with client needs and industry standards. Skilled in product design, estimation, competitive analysis, and developing pre-sales strategies to drive customer satisfaction and revenue growth. Adept at building client relationships, coordinating with vendors and OEMs, and ensuring compliance with regulatory standards. Expert in preparing presentations, RFP responses, and technical proposals to secure high-value contracts across both public and private sectors.

## Organizational Experience **Mar’ 2024 to Till Date – CMS Computers India Pvt. Ltd**

**Company Profile:** Established in 1976 a leading player in India's Information and Communication Technology (ICT) sector. With a workforce exceeding 4,000 employees across more than 100 locations nationwide, the company offers a diverse range of products and services. These include governance services, transportation and traffic solutions, energy management, surveillance and workforce management, broadcasting solutions, and software services.

**Designation:** Pre-Sales Consultant (National Role)

**Roles & Responsibilities:**

*   Engage with clients to understand business and technical needs and document requirements.
*   Design tailored technical solutions, identify integration points, and develop comprehensive proposals with technical documentation.
*   Evaluate vendors, products, and technologies, conduct cost-benefit analysis, and stay updated on industry trends.
*   Create detailed cost estimates, allocate resources, and conduct risk assessments for project delivery.
*   Lead bid responses for RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs, ensuring technical compliance, writing proposals, and coordinating with teams for accurate documentation.
*   Organize product demos, conduct workshops, and present solutions to clients to highlight value propositions.
*   Align technical solutions with sales strategies, train sales teams, and provide documentation to support sales efforts.
*   Address client queries, assist in negotiations, and ensure smooth handover of project details to implementation teams.
*   Track bid success rates, identify process improvements, and report on bid status and pre-sales performance.

---

# Organizational Experience Aug’ 2021 to Mar’24 - Supertron Electronics Pvt. Ltd

**Company Profile:** Established in 1993 a prominent IT and telecom distribution company in India. Headquartered in Kolkata, it has expanded its reach across the nation, boasting over 55 locations and a network of more than 9,000 retail points. The company offers a comprehensive range of products, including servers, laptops, components, and accessories, catering to diverse customer needs. SEPL's strategic partnerships with over 31 multinational corporations have significantly contributed to its growth and market presence.

**Designation:** Product Manager (National Role)

* Select and manage product portfolio, oversee product lifecycle, and define the product roadmap aligned with market opportunities.
* Maintain vendor relationships, negotiate pricing, ensure timely availability, and collaborate on marketing and product launches.
* Conduct market research, track competitors, and analyze customer feedback to refine product offerings.
* Develop pricing models, optimize margins, and implement incentive programs for distribution channels.
* Train sales teams, develop sales tools, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to align product strategies.
* Collaborate on demand forecasting, monitor inventory, and ensure efficient supply chain coordination.
* Plan marketing campaigns, develop promotions, and align brand messaging to boost product sales and visibility.
* Engage key accounts, address customer concerns, and integrate feedback for product improvement.
* Track product performance and adjust strategies based on sales data and market insights.
* Ensure regulatory compliance, maintain product quality standards, and manage documentation.
* Lead cross-functional teams, oversee product-related projects, and communicate product vision to stakeholders.

* Assist in designing scalable solutions, prepare cost estimates, and conduct cost-benefit analysis to align with project specifications.
* Support bid strategies, manage RFP responses, prepare proposals, and ensure timely submission of tender documents.
* Evaluate vendors, coordinate with OEMs for pricing, and recommend products based on client needs.
* Help prepare client presentations, conduct product demos, and support client workshops to demonstrate solution capabilities.
* Collaborate with sales teams to align solutions with customer needs and provide technical documentation and support for sales efforts.
* Assist with post-bid clarifications, contract negotiations, and project handover to ensure smooth transition to the implementation phase.
* Monitor bid performance, track success rates, and provide regular updates to senior management.
* Ensure proposals and designs meet industry standards and client specifications, maintaining high-quality output.
* Work closely with cross-functional teams and support senior team members in project execution and delivery.

---

**Academic Details**

B.E – Electrical Engineering from Mumbai University, Mumbai in 2006
HSC (Physics /Chemistry /Mathematics /Biology) from St. Xavier’s, Mumbai in 2002
SSC (Mathematics /Science /Social Studies) from St. Xavier’s, Mumbai in 2000.
